Class Building

java.lang.Object
it.polimi.Abstract.Card
it.polimi.Abstract.Building
Direct Known Subclasses:
AddStar, EndGame_Builder_Add, Endgame_Effect, Event_Add_Effect, Event_Less_Ritual, Event_Most_Ritual, Event_Sustenance_Effect, InGame_Effect, Turn_End_Card, Turn_Start_Effect
public class Building extends Card
Base class for all building cards in the game. Buildings provide various effects, ranging from immediate bonuses to end-game scoring multipliers.

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    Building(Era era, Position position, int cost, int points)
    Creates a building card with the given era, position, cost, and points.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    applyCardEffect()
    Applies the standard card effect for the building (e.g., drawing extra cards).
    void
    applyContinuousEffect()
    Applies a continuous effect triggered during the game.
    int
    applyDiscountEffect()
    Returns any discount granted by the building for resource gathering or construction.
    void
    applyEventsEffect()
    Applies the effect that depends on event interactions.
    void
    applyOrderEffect()
    Applies the effect that depends on order or turn sequence.
    void
    applyRitualEffect()
    Applies ritual-specific effects for the building.
    int
    getCost()
    Returns the construction cost of the building.
    int
    getPoints()
    Returns the points granted by the building.

    Methods inherited from class Card

    getAssetId, getEra, getPosition, setAssetId, setPosition

    Methods inherited from class Object

    clone, equals, finalize, getClass, hashCode, notify, notifyAll, toString, wait, wait, wait

  • Constructor Details

    • Building

      public Building(Era era, Position position, int cost, int points)
      Creates a building card with the given era, position, cost, and points.
      Parameters:
      era - The era this building belongs to.
      position - The initial board position.
      cost - The construction cost.
      points - The base points granted.

  • Method Details

    • getCost

      public int getCost()
      Returns the construction cost of the building.
      Returns:
      The cost value.

    • getPoints

      public int getPoints()
      Returns the points granted by the building.
      Returns:
      The prestige points value.

    • applyRitualEffect

      public void applyRitualEffect()
      Applies ritual-specific effects for the building. To be overridden by ritual building subclasses.

    • applyCardEffect

      public void applyCardEffect()
      Applies the standard card effect for the building (e.g., drawing extra cards). To be overridden by relevant subclasses.

    • applyContinuousEffect

      public void applyContinuousEffect()
      Applies a continuous effect triggered during the game. To be overridden by buildings with passive/persistent abilities.

    • applyEventsEffect

      public void applyEventsEffect()
      Applies the effect that depends on event interactions. To be overridden by buildings that react to specific game events.

    • applyOrderEffect

      public void applyOrderEffect()
      Applies the effect that depends on order or turn sequence. To be overridden by buildings that grant bonuses based on player order.

    • applyDiscountEffect

      public int applyDiscountEffect()
      Returns any discount granted by the building for resource gathering or construction.
      Returns:
      The discount value (default is 0).
